revision.comment: new key for [[Category:10th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
revision.text:

}} {{wikidata link|Q15306157}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:10th-century Buddhist temples]] [[en:Category:10th-century Buddhist temples]] [[ja:10th-century Buddhist temples]] [[ja:Category:10世紀の仏教寺院]] [[es:Category:Templos budistas del siglo X]] [[fa:Category:معبدهای بودایی سده ۱۰ (میلادی)]] [[tr:Category:10. yüzyılda tamamlanan Budist tapınakları]] [[ur:Category:دسویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST10th-century Buddhist temples]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhism|Temp]] [[Category:10th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 10]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22535397968|commit triggered pipeline]]
